import PageExample from '@site/src/components/PageExample';
import { ServerErrorPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<PageExample>
  <ServerErrorPage
    serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
    languages={[
      { code: 'en', label: 'English' },
      { code: 'am', label: 'አማርኛ' },
    ]}
    locale="en"
    onLocale={() => {}}
    onRetry={() => {}}
    footerGroups={[{ title: 'About', links: [{ label: 'Accessibility', href: '/accessibility' }] }]}
    copyright="© 2026 Government of Ethiopia."
  />
</PageExample>

Something went wrong on the server — reassures the citizen it isn't their
fault and offers a retry. Never exposes a stack trace or other technical
detail; log that server-side instead.

```tsx
import { ServerErrorPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<ServerErrorPage
  serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
  languages={[{ code: 'en', label: 'English' }]}
  locale="en"
  onLocale={(code) => { /* … */ }}
  onRetry={() => { /* … */ }}
/>
```

## When to use this template

Render this for any unhandled server-side failure. The host application
is responsible for returning the actual HTTP `500` status; this
component only renders the page body, and stays lightweight since it may
render while systems are degraded.

## Accessibility & localization

- One `<h1>`, the standard chrome, and a skip link.
- **Try again** is a real, primary, keyboard-operable action; a link home
  and a contact path are both offered as alternatives.
- All text is a `labels` prop with English defaults, overridable per
  locale.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `serviceName` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `homeHref` | `string` (default `'/'`) | No |
| `contactHref` | `string` (default `'/contact'`) | No |
| `languages` | `LanguageOption[]` | Yes |
| `locale` | `string` | Yes |
| `onLocale` | `(code: string) => void` | Yes |
| `onRetry` | `() => void` | Yes |
| `footerGroups` | `FooterLinkGroup[]` | No |
| `copyright` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `labels` | `Partial<ServerErrorPageLabels>` | No |
